attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT             
,WSOLV.SS_CODE                       
,WSOLV.BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT    
,WSOLV.BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT          
,WSOLV.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT         
,WSOLV.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
,WSOLV.START_SSP_DATE                
,WSOLV.START_TV_DTM                  
,WSOLV.END_SSP_DATE                  
,WSOLV.END_TV_DTM                    
,WSOLV.DISPATCH_DTM                  
,WSOLV.PRINT_QUEUE_NAME              
,WSOLV.CNTRCT_CONVERSION_STATUS_NAME 
,WSOLV.DISPATCH_STATUS_CD            
,WSOLV.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WSOLV.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WSOLV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WSOLV.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WSOLV.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM          
,WSOLV.AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM 
,WSOLV.DV_DUP_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM_FLG  
,WSOLV.GOODS_PROD_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
,WSOLV.ASSEMBLE_TO_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY  
,WSOLV.SPLIT_FROM_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
,WSOLV.ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_DTM     
,WSOLV.ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_STAT_CD 
,WSOLV.SOL_SHIP_METHOD_ID            
,WSOLV.BUNDLE_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY      
,WSOLV.CONSTITUENT_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY 
,WSOLV.SOL_SHIP_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD
,WSOLV.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD            
,WSOLV.CUST_TRX_REFERENCE_NUM        
,WSOLV.SRC_RPTD_SHIP_TO_EMAIL_CMT    
,WSOLV.DV_BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DT           
,WSOLV.SOL_TAA_FLG                   
,WSOLV.DD_TOP_MODEL_SLS_ORDR_LINE_KEY
,WSOLV.RU_CONFIG_PRNT_SLS_ORDR_LN_KEY
,WSOLV.PRODUCT_CONFIG_CHECKED_FLG    
,WSOLV.RU_CONFIG_SUB_PARENT_SOL_KEY  
,WSOLV.EARLY_BUILD_ROLE              
,WSOLV.RU_EARLY_BUILD_START_DT       
,WSOLV.CONTRACT_DURATION_ROLE        
,WSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT 
,WSOLV.EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DLVRY_DT  
,WSOLV.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE           
,WSOLV.SHIPPABLE_ROLE                
,WSOLV.SVC_CONTRACT_EFFECT_DAYS_CNT  
,WSOLV.DEFAULT_FREIGHT_TERMS_CD      
,WSOLV.DEFAULT_FRGHT_PYMNT_METHOD_CD 
,WSOLV.DEFAULT_FREIGHT_ON_BOARD_CD   
,WSOLV.INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT_CD  
,WSOLV.INIT_CISCO_SCHDL_RESULT_DTM   
,WSOLV.DV_INIT_CISCO_SCHDL_RESULT_DT 
,WSOLV.INIT_PRMSD_TO_CUST_SHPMNT_DT  
,WSOLV.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME             
,WSOLV.BK_ORDER_QTY_UNIT_MEASURE_CD  
,NULL INIT_SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT        
,'N' OM_EXCEPTION_ROLE             
,NULL JUST_IN_TIME_START_DT         
,'UNKNOWN'DEMAND_CLASS_CD               
,'N' ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG    
,'UNKNOWN'LEGACY_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD   
,WSOLV.RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY     
,WSOLV.PRICING_QTY             
,WSOLV.CUSTOMER_LINE_NUMBER AS EXTRNL_PO_LN_NUM_NAME_NUM     
,'UNKNOWN' PAK_CD                        
,'UNKNOWN' INTL_GLBLORDLN_SRCNG_RULE_NAME
,NULL INITIAL_SCHEDULING_ELIGIBLE_DT
,NULL EP_SMT_LINE_ID_INT            
,NULL SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER_CD        
,'SHIP' DD_REQUEST_DATE_BASIS_TYPE    
,-999 LEG0_STD_TRANSIT_TIME_DAYS_CNT
,-999 LEG1_STD_TRANSIT_TIME_DAYS_CNT
,-999 LEG2_STD_TRANSIT_TIME_DAYS_CNT
,WSOLV.PROMISED_CUST_DLVRY_DT AS RU_PROMISED_CUST_DLVRY_DT     
,NULL RU_ACTUAL_CUST_DLVRY_DT       
,NULL RU_INITIAL_PRMSD_CUST_DLVRY_DT
,WSOLV.ESTIMATED_ARRIVAL_DT AS RU_ESTIMATED_ARRIVAL_DT       
,NULL FUTURE_INVOICE_RELEASE_DTM    
,NULL DV_FUTURE_INVOICE_RELEASE_DT  
,'UNKNOWN'  BK_RQSTD_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM 
,NULL SRC_DRVD_CUST_RQSTD_SHPMNT_DT 
,'UNKNOWN'  PROJECTED_CARRIER_CD          
,'UNKNOWN' SHIPPING_PREF_DETAIL_CD       
,-999 END_CUST_ERP_CNTCT_PRTY_KEY   
,'UNKNOWN'  PROJECTED_CARRIER_NAME        
,'UNKNOWN'  CCW_FREIGHT_CARRIER_NAME      
,-999 CONSOLIDATED_SET_ID_INT       
,'3500-01-01' INTRMDT_PROMISE_SHIP_DT       
,'3500-01-01' INTRMDT_PROMISE_DLVRY_DT      
,'UNKNOWN' SOL_LINE_RETURN_TRACKING_NUM 
,COALESCE(WSOLV.BK_MFG_PO_OPRTNG_UNIT_NAME_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_MFG_PO_OPRTNG_UNIT_NAME_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF CBM MAY REL */
,WSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM AS SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM  /* Added as part of Revenue Accruals Q2FY19*/ 
,WSOLV.RETROSPECTIVE_CANCELLATION_DTM /*Q3FY21 Annuity Rel*/
,WSOLV.DV_RETROSPEC_CANCELLATION_DT
,WSOLV.RETROSPEC_UNUSED_TERM_MONT_CNT
,-6666 AS FEE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,WSOLV.COT_ORDER_QTY_SPLIT_CODE AS COT_ORDER_QTY_SPLIT_CODE
,COALESCE(WSOLV.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES,'UNKNOWN') AS PARTNER_ENTRD_END_CUST_NOTE_TXT,
RU_MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER_NAME,
RU_MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM_NAME
--,WSOLV.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES /* 1 column added FEB 2024 release */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SALES_ORDER_LINES_V1_OPL WSOLV  
WHERE  WSOLV.DML_TYPE='I'
AND NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
WHERE WSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NSOLV.SS_CODE='OPL'
)
